description:
Track user progression through key feature adoption paths (e.g., first login → profile setup → first operation created → first report generated). Visualize drop-off points and time-to-adoption metrics for each core feature.

**Rationale:** Identifies friction points in the user journey and reveals which features drive engagement versus which are underutilized, enabling data-driven UX improvements.


this should be available only in backoffice not for saas project
